user.title: Pair SIT tablet
user.description: Enter the websocket details shown by the Android app, then choose which Home Assistant entities this tablet may see and control.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the tablet websocket.
error.connection_closed: The tablet closed the pairing websocket before pairing finished.
error.invalid_pairing_code: The tablet rejected the pairing code.
error.invalid_response: The tablet sent an invalid pairing response.
error.missing_device_id: The tablet did not send a device id.
error.token_not_confirmed: The tablet did not confirm that it received the token.

init.title: SIT tablet options
init.description: Choose which entities this tablet may see and control.
